```prompt
---
agent: agent
description: "Implement stress testing for system stability under extreme conditions"
---
# Stress Tests
## Task
Implement stress tests for system stability under extreme load.
## Requirements
1. Push system beyond normal operating limits.
2. Test memory exhaustion, connection pool saturation, disk full.
3. Monitor for crashes, data corruption, and resource leaks.
4. Measure recovery behavior after stress removal.
5. Document failure modes and thresholds.
## Constraints
- Run in isolated environments only. Set resource limits and timeouts.
## Success Criteria
- Failure modes are documented. System recovers after stress removal. No data corruption.
```
